Business: Chennai Petroleum Corporation Limited produces and supplies petroleum products in India. The company offers liquefied petroleum gas, naphtha, motor gasoline and spirit, kerosene, aviation turbine fuel, automotive high-speed and high flash diesel, light diesel oil, and bunker and non-bunker fuel oil.   Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)

  Current: 17.05  (-8.58% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
